font.font:
Shop Frontend
[Container: Next]
A web application built with Next.js that serves both customers and shop owners. Customers can browse or purchase products, while shop owners manage their store content through an admin interface.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

font.font:
Shop Backend
[Container: FastApi Python]
A REST API built with FastAPI that handles business logic and data operations for the platform. It supports both the customer-facing and admin-facing frontend, managing products, users, subscriptions, and shop configurations.
